planned_patches.description: Add 'quote_time' as alias for 'timestamp' in post_ea_market_stream handler. Add 'candles' array shim (uses candles[0] as M1 candle when 'candle' absent). Fix audit log to use resolved timestamp. Update docblock.
Update post_ea_market_stream docblock to document both legacy (timestamp/candle/candle_m15) and canonical (quote_time/source/server_time/candles[]) formats.
Add regression test for quote_time alias: payload using quote_time instead of timestamp must be accepted and correctly processed.
